name: Salmon Vegetable Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. NOTE: A combination of sour cream and plain yogurt (to total 2 cups) may be substituted for plain sour cream.
2. Flake the salmon and combine with remaining ingredients.
3. Refrigerate several hours before serving. Serve with raw vegetables, crackers, chips, and bread. Attractive served in hollowed-out round loaf of dark bread.
Carol, Soldotna, Alaska
Source: Alaska Seafood Cookbook
Reprinted by permission from the Alaska Seafood Marketing Institute Meal-Master compatible recipe format courtesy of Karen Mintzias
